response.justification: While Bogdan has strong software engineering credentials, seniority demonstrated by Principal/Staff roles at Google and Meta, and recent AI-agent infrastructure experience, the role requires deep expertise in SoC and IP modeling, GPU architecture, and hardware-software co-design at the physical optimization level. His 14+ years of experience and education (BS + 8+ years) satisfy the baseline requirement, but his career has been focused on full-stack software, cloud infrastructure, and AI frameworks rather than hardware architecture, performance modeling, or accelerator design—the core technical pillars of this position.
strengths: Principal-level seniority demonstrated through recent Google/Meta staff roles, with proven ability to architect complex systems
Recent hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and ML frameworks at Google, showing current relevant domain exposure
Strong track record of performance optimization and low-latency systems (real-time databases at Dunnhumby, pricing optimization at Meta)
concerns: No demonstrated experience with SoC/IP modeling, SPICE simulation, RTL design, or hardware architecture—foundational skills for this role
Career focused on full-stack software development and cloud infrastructure; minimal evidence of hardware-software co-design or GPU/accelerator optimization
No background in deep neural network training/inference optimization or GPU workload analysis—preferred qualifications that are critical for performance analysis in this domain
